title: Cybersecurity
description: A curated database of premium learning resources to master computer networking, Linux systems, ethical hacking, and enterprise cyber defense.

categories.name: Security & Linux Fundamentals
categories.description: Build foundations in Linux terminal operations, networking protocols, and standard security principles.

resources.name: OverTheWire: Bandit
resources.description: An outstanding SSH-based wargame aimed at absolute beginners. Players learn basic Linux command-line commands, file operations, permissions, and scripting to retrieve passwords and unlock consecutive levels.

resources.name: SANS Cyber Aces Online
resources.description: A high-quality foundational course developed by the prestigious SANS Institute, covering operating system security, basic networking, and core cryptography principles.

categories.name: Ethical Hacking & Pentesting Labs
categories.description: Learn defensive analysis, web application exploitation, and practical penetration testing in active sandbox labs.

resources.name: TryHackMe Learning Paths
resources.description: A highly interactive, gamified platform featuring complete learning paths (e.g., Complete Beginner, Junior Penetration Tester) that guide users through hacking sandbox computers directly via an in-browser cloud instance.

resources.name: PortSwigger Web Security Academy
resources.description: The gold-standard resource for learning web application security. Features interactive labs and academic material covering SQL injection, Cross-Site Scripting (XSS), CSRF, API security, and access control bypasses.

resources.name: Hack The Box Labs
resources.description: An advanced, highly respected platform offering live sandbox environments to practice system exploits, privilege escalation, Active Directory attacks, and reverse engineering.

categories.name: Frameworks & Cyber Defense
categories.description: Master professional industry frameworks, threat intelligence, and certifications standard.

resources.name: CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 Course
resources.description: The complete, highly thorough video tutorial playlist covering every domain of the CompTIA Security+ certification. Explains network structures, risk management, threat vectors, and incident response.
